mapper.select: SELECT STOCK_ID ,STOCK_NAME ,TRADE_CATEGORY ,TOTAL_TRADE_PRICE ,TRADE_COUNT ,STOCK_PRICE ,AFTER_BALANCE ,TRADE_DATE FROM TRADE_HISTORIES JOIN STOCKS ON TRADE_HISTORIES.STOCK_ID = STOCKS.STOCK_ID WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT TRADE_CATEGORY ,TOTAL_TRADE_PRICE ,TRADE_COUNT ,STOCK_PRICE ,TRADE_DATE FROM TRADE_HISTORIES WHERE STOCK_ID = #{stockId}
